steps.title: Confirm the installation effect
steps.content: The first sentence says Vik's installation creates a whimsical yet perplexing experience. The next sentence supports that claim by describing visitors as both dazzled and confused, so the details illustrate the same reaction.

steps.title: Reject wrong transition signals
steps.content: Choice A signals a list item. Choice B signals contrast despite an obstacle. Choice D signals replacement. The needed transition confirms and emphasizes the previous claim. The answer is C.
